creator: freebsd.users@gmail.com
text:
This port is now marked as BROKEN, editors/calligra depend on this
port and can't be built. The maintainer should lower the version (I
did a portdowngrade on this) and let people install opengtl-0.9.16_1
for compiling calligra and office productivity, which builds faster
than OOo or libreoffice.

Best,

Justin
